steps: For the preparation of 1L of media (50 to 66 petri dishes depending of depth) weigh: 10 g, Peptic Digest from Animal tissue 10 g, Meat Extract 5 g, NaCl 12 g, Lactose 0.032 g, Neutral Red 10 g, Agar 30 mL, Egg yolk Emulsion Final pH ( at 25°C) 7.0±0.2
Heat to boiling to dissolve the medium completely.
Sterilize by autoclaving at 15 lbs pressure 121 °C for 00:15:00 .
Add 120 mL sterile skimmed milk 10% solution.
Aseptically add 30 mL Egg Yolk Emulsion.
Pour 15 mL or 20 mL of media in petri dishes depending on desired depth .
Let cool the open petri dishes under UV light for 00:10:00 to 00:15:00 .
Close petri dishes and keep at 4 °C until use. (2 weeks max)
creator: Ana Lara
